opportunities.title: AI Sales Summit (Sales 3.0 Conference series)
opportunities.deadline: Rolling – speaker nominations accepted on an ongoing basis via online form
opportunities.fit_reason: A trust-based sales coach can speak to how human trust and ethical selling fit into an AI-driven sales pipeline, a stated theme of this summit for sales, sales ops, and enablement leaders.

opportunities.title: Sales Training and Enablement Summit (Sales 3.0 Conference series)
opportunities.deadline: Rolling – speaker nominations accepted on an ongoing basis via online form
opportunities.fit_reason: This virtual summit for sales managers and enablement leaders is built around coaching and training frameworks, a natural fit for a trust-based selling and sales culture keynote.

opportunities.title: OutBound Conference 2026
opportunities.date: November 9-12, 2026, Red Rock Casino Resort, Las Vegas, NV
opportunities.deadline: Not publicly listed – contact organizers directly to inquire about speaking
opportunities.fit_reason: Billed as the world's premier sales training and leadership conference bringing together top sales trainers, it's a high-visibility stage for a trust-based selling and sales leadership message aimed at both individual sellers and leaders.

opportunities.title: Sales Enablement Summit Sydney
opportunities.deadline: 2026 speaker lineup not yet finalized – worth reaching out to organizers
opportunities.fit_reason: This APAC gathering of senior sales enablement and revenue leaders focuses on coaching, GTM alignment, and elevating sales culture, aligning closely with a trust-based sales leadership keynote.

opportunities.title: PSA Convention ELEVATE27
opportunities.deadline: Not yet announced – monitor PSA events page for call for speakers/showcase opportunities
opportunities.fit_reason: Australia's premier gathering of professional speakers offers networking and showcase opportunities that can help a trust-based sales coach build referral relationships with event organizers and bureaus.

opportunities.title: The Sales Podcast / The CRM Sushi Podcast Guest Booking
opportunities.deadline: Open now – book via online scheduling form
opportunities.fit_reason: An established sales podcast explicitly inviting guest interviews to help listeners "get to know, like, and trust" the guest, a direct match for a trust-based selling message.

opportunities.title: Women in Sales (Australia) Quarterly Panel Events
opportunities.deadline: No formal deadline – contact organizers to propose a panel or speaking role
opportunities.fit_reason: These quarterly Australian sales leadership panels bring together sales directors and senior leaders to discuss sales culture and career development, a strong audience match for trust-based selling content.
